How It Works

4 Step Matchmaking

🎟 Create Session

Start a movie session and get a unique link.

➔

🍿 Invite Partner

Share the link and invite your movie partner.

➔

🎬 Start Swiping

Browse movies together and share your picks.

➔

❤️ Match Movies

Get matched and find your perfect movie to watch.

LIGHTS. CAMERA. MATCH.

Find your perfect movie with your favorite person. Zero friction, total cinematic alignment.

Start Your Session

🎬 MOVIEMATE

A luxury cinema-themed matchmaking experience designed to make your movie selection instant, fun, and secure. Fully integrated with the TMDb API.
